zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe是Thomas de Radcliffe Sir的兒子，於大約1182年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1200年與Ellen Balderston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe是Thomas de Radcliffe Sir的儿子，于大约1182年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1200年与Ellen Balderston在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe was born about 1182, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. He married Ellen Balderston about 1200, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe est né environ 1182, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. Il a épousé Ellen Balderston environ 1200, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe wurde um 1182 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Thomas de Radcliffe Sir geboren. Er hat um 1200 in England, United Kingdom Ellen Balderston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe è nato il circa 1182 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. Lui sposato Ellen Balderston circa 1200, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffeは約1182年にイギリスイギリスでThomas de Radcliffe Sirの息子として生まれた。約1200年にイギリスイギリスでEllen Balderstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe(은)는 대략 1182년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Thomas de Radcliffe Sir의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ellen Balderston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. Ele casou-se com Ellen Balderston aproximadamente 1200, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe родился около 1182 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Balderston около 1200 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Radcliffe nació aproximadamente 1182, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Thomas de Radcliffe Sir. Se casó con Ellen Balderston aproximadamente 1200, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
